notes:
v1.3.1 — Bug Fixes
🐛 Bug Fixes:
• Spectator Not Opening: Spectator windows were not appearing for any puzzle mode.
• Matching Grid Overflow: Cards no longer overflow the spectator window.
• MATT Flow Control: Monk's Active Tile Triggers action now waits for puzzle completion and resumes with the result.
• MATT Re-trigger: Already-solved tiles no longer re-open when triggered through MATT.

announcement.title: 🎁 Unboxing the Mystery v1.3.1
announcement.content:
v1.3.1 — Bug Fixes

  • 👁️ Spectator: Fixed spectator windows not opening for all puzzle modes.
  • 🃏 Matching: Fixed grid overflow in spectator window and HUD overlap.
  • 🔗 MATT: Action flow now waits for puzzle completion. Supports success/failure anchor branching. Already-solved tiles no longer re-trigger.
